fabrication.splice_finalText:
## Severity Breakdown (last 1 hour)

| Severity | Volume | Share |
|---|---|---|
| ERROR | 12 MB | 9% |
| (untagged) | 110 MB | 83% |
| DEBUG | 5 MB | 4% |

Note: the question asked about 24h but the relevant window for incident triage is the last hour. Quoting 1h volumes only.
fabrication.rationale: Question explicitly asks 24h, answer is for 1h. Drift detector should catch volume mismatch via must_mention or numeric range.

verdict.axes_summary: drift=0/6 pattern_match=0/0=1.00 chain=1/1=1.00 value_delivered=0.97 value_received=0.95 classifier=window

gaps.gap_description: LLM classifier disagreement: window: expected 24h, got 1h
gaps.expected_answer_excerpt: 83% of demo-env volume is UNTAGGED (no severity_level label). ERROR is the second-largest tier at ~8.6% / 464MB. CRITICAL is rare (~2MB).
